case_title: WESTWOOD CHECK CASHING VS SPARKIES DELIVERY SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY WESTWOOD CHECK CASHING AS TO DEFENDANT SPARKIES DELIVERY SERVICE BREWER, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPARKIES DELIVERY SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTWOOD CHECK CASHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPARKIES DELIVERY SERVICE BREWER, FRANK $330.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $378.00, FRANK BREWER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
